newsSince: No clearly new company-specific catalyst since June 9. The robotics/physical-AI evidence (Q1 reported May 19: record 471,723-unit shipments +30% YoY, 4th straight GAAP-profitable quarter, reaffirmed 3-3.5M unit FY26 guide, Mercedes L3 supplier, Kosmo/SGI spatial-intelligence launch, robotics wins incl. Zelos 200k Robovans and NIU FTX) predates the baseline. The -12.85% move is flow, not new bad news.

sources.label: Hesai Picasso 6D / spatial intelligence & physical AI
Hesai Q1 2026 earnings call transcript (Motley Fool)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold #11 on the humanoid/robotics-stack lens. The concrete robotics evidence (Kosmo/SGI, Zelos 200k Robovan win, NIU FTX, KargoBot 6D) and GAAP profitability remain best-in-class for a sensing pure-play, but it was already captured in the June 8 up-move. No new catalyst since June 9; the -12.85% drop is flow, so no fundamental delta.
verdicts.bull: Concrete robotics design wins (Zelos 200k, NIU, KargoBot) + Kosmo/SGI give real physical-AI optionality; GAAP profitable.
verdicts.neutral: Strong execution but robotics revenue still small vs ADAS core.
verdicts.bear: -33% YTD; US listing/geopolitical overhang; SGI revenue immaterial near-term.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Kosmo demo shipments + robotics design-win ramp H2 2026
verdicts.primaryRisk: China-ADR policy risk; robotics monetization slower than guided
